name: Treasure Island Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the 4 chicken breasts skin side up in a greased shallow baking dish.
2. Brush with melted butter.
3. Bake in a preheated oven at 375F for 30 minutes.
4. Meanwhile, melt another half stick of butter.
5. In a small bowl, combine flour, sugar, salt (if using), cinnamon, and ginger. Mix well.
6. Gradually add the melted butter to the dry mixture, stirring constantly.
7. Slowly incorporate orange juice while continuing to stir.
8. Cook until the sauce thickens and becomes smooth.
9. Pour the sauce over the chicken breasts.
10. Bake for an additional 40 minutes.
